kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep those carpets fresh and your schedule packed. Ready to manage your jobs and grow your client base?

quickActions.label: Schedule a cleaning
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new carpet cleaning job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for carpet cleaning.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What carpet cleaning jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a carpet cleaning business. You help manage cleaning appointments, coordinate technicians and equipment, handle estimates based on room count and carpet type, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We'll get your carpets looking and smelling like new. Are you looking to schedule a carpet cleaning or get a quote?
commonReasons: Get a quote for carpet cleaning

steps.title: Name your carpet cleaning business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your technicians operate.

steps.title: Add your cleaning services
steps.body: List the services you offer: steam cleaning, dry cleaning, stain removal, pet odor treatment, upholstery, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing per room, per square foot, or by service type.

steps.title: Add your technicians
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign and schedule cleaning jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your carpet cleaning business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking jobs!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a carpet cleaning business.
capabilities: Schedule and manage carpet cleaning appointments
Create estimates based on room count and service type
Track equipment maintenance and cleaning solution inventory
Send automated appointment reminders to clients
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage upsell opportunities for stain protection and add-on services
Analyze revenue by service type and property size
